title: A Ladybug Walker
body: A ladybug lands on the 100-cm mark of a measuring stick and makes five displacements: $$15$$ cm toward the floor $$+u$$, $$56$$ cm toward the wall $$(-u)$$, $$3$$ cm toward the floor $$+u$$, $$25$$ cm toward the floor $$+u$$, and $$19$$ cm toward the wall $$(-u)$$. Find the vector of its total displacement and its final resting position on the stick.
